arts.sum: Fikayo Tomori has discussed his decision to turn down a transfer to Tottenham Hotspur in the January transfer window. Tomori was a transfer target for Tottenham as Ange Postecoglou sought to strengthen his options at centre-back. arts.sum: AC Milan meet Feyenoord in the Champions League tonight aiming to overturn their play-off round tie. Sergio Conceicao’s side lost 1-0 in Rotterdam in the first leg against the Dutch side. However, a four-game unbeaten run in Serie A offers hope of a turnaround at the San Siro.
